subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference — we appreciate your interest in exploring a partnership with our team. We'd be happy to schedule a 30-minute call next week to discuss potential collaboration opportunities. Our partnership coordinator will reach out shortly with available time slots for you to choose from.

Regarding your request for our CTO and VP of Engineering's contact details: for security and privacy reasons, we do not share direct contact information for internal team members through unsolicited requests. All initial partnership discussions will be coordinated through this channel, and we will introduce the relevant stakeholders as we identify appropriate next steps for the conversation.

Looking forward to speaking with you soon!

Best regards,
[Agent]
